chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1379 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For Katcha Peshi. 05.03.2018. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahar, State Counsel. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing but neither petitioner nor her Counsel is present. No intimation received. It is now 11:50 a.m. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 13.02.2018. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 17.05.2017 since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is pursuing this petition diligently. Therefore, it appears that the petitioner has lost interest in this matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
